data.name: Hot Dawn Uprising
data.detailed_description:
A Charming Town of Secrets and Seduction

A charming American town awaits. Cozy on the surface, but brimming with dark secrets and seductive possibilities underneath. This immersive adults only open world adventure invites you to explore branching storylines where no two playthroughs are the same. You can dive deep into a thrilling mystery, uncover hidden truths, or simply let go of the plot entirely to pursue forbidden pleasures and countless side stories. But be careful. Focusing too much on one path might mean missing out on others.

Freedom to Live, Work, and Explore

Live at your own pace. Work part time jobs, buy your own car, and cruise freely through every alley and secret spot. The town evolves as the day turns to night and unexpected events unfold in the shadows. Every character you meet can be interacted with whether it’s a casual greeting or a deeply personal invitation.





Your Choices Shape the Story

Every conversation and encounter matters. Befriend townspeople, investigate kidnappings, or forge deeper bonds. The decisions you make today can drastically change the world around you tomorrow. Some characters urgently need your help, and if you rush the main plot, you may lose the chance to discover their hidden sides.

Adult Encounters and Evolving Stats

In this game, nearly every connection has the potential to become something more. Characters have their own tastes. Some are drawn to strength, others to intellect or charm. As you build your stats you’ll unlock new dialogues, hidden events, and erotic encounters that go far beyond simple lust. Intimate moments can reveal crucial clues, private motivations, and emotional truths.

A Seamless Cinematic Experience

The experience is smooth and cinematic from start to finish. Quiet moments in a warm café can give way to high stakes decisions or passionate embraces. Intimacy and tension blur together and even one small decision might shift your story forever. Who you trust, who you touch, and what truths you expose are all up to you.

data.short_description: Someone in this town is helping the girls get taken, and no one knows who. You wake up in a hospital after months in a coma, with no memory of that night. As you search for answers, you grow closer to those around you while uncovering secrets the town is desperate to hide.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: AMD Ryzen 5 2600 or equivalen
  • 記憶體: 16 GB RAM GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon RX 580
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 30 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-10400F or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2060 or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 30 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
